title: cirsium longistylum
intro: Cirsium longistylum, also known as the long-styled thistle, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to China and Tibet. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cirsium longistylum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, thanks to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
